fields.tf_name: HGNC gene symbol(s) of ALL transcription factors directly perturbed in this experiment. List every co-perturbed TF separated by commas. For fusion proteins (e.g., AML1-ETO), provide HGNC symbols of both components (e.g., RUNX1, RUNX1T1). If no TF perturbation, leave blank.
fields.organism: scientific name of the organism used
fields.platform: GPL accession of the microarray platform (found in GEO metadata)

criterion: Does this experiment include a direct genetic or molecular manipulation of a transcription factor (TF)? Answer YES if a TF is knocked out (KO/cKO/null), knocked down (siRNA/shRNA/antisense), overexpressed (transgene, induction, retroviral/lentiviral vector), mutated (point mutation, dominant-negative, truncation), or expressed as a fusion protein (e.g., AML1-ETO, ETV6-RUNX1). Answer NO if: (1) a non-TF gene such as a kinase, receptor, or signaling molecule is the primary perturbation and a TF merely responds downstream; (2) a TF is only measured or observed as a readout without being directly manipulated; or (3) a TF genotype (e.g., Trp53-null) describes the background strain rather than the experimental variable being tested.
